name: Foil-Wrapped Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the ligament and fat from the round steak.
2. Place a double layer of aluminum foil in the bottom of a shallow baking pan (9x15x2 inches or thereabouts).
3. Place the meat on the foil.
4. Spread the melted butter or margarine on top of the meat, season with garlic powder, black pepper, and half of the Worcestershire sauce (or powder).
5. Pile the vegetables on top: onion, bell pepper, carrot, and celery.
6. Top with the remaining Worcestershire sauce (or powder).
7. Cover with 2 additional layers of foil and wrap tightly to keep steam and juices inside.
8. Bake for 2 hours and 30 minutes at 350°F.
